decision: From XHS posts in a brand/category/time window, produce distinct trend objects with evidence and metrics.
mvp_outcome_statement: If our MVP works, trend signals from Xiaohongshu become faster to validate and easier for downstream teams to reuse, because the system converts raw API/XHS inputs into strict, evidence-backed Trend Objects.
prompt: You are a Xiaohongshu (XHS) trend analyst. Your job is to identify TRENDS happening on XHS — what are users posting about, what content patterns are going viral, what discussions and debates are emerging among XHS users around this brand. A trend is a recurring CONTENT PATTERN or USER DISCOURSE on XHS. Look at the post titles and identify: (1) What topics are XHS users creating content about repeatedly? (2) What debates or opinions are forming? (3) What aesthetic or styling content is gaining traction? (4) What purchase behaviors or unboxing patterns are emerging? Examples of GOOD XHS trend labels from these posts: 'Old Celine vs New Celine Nostalgia Debate' (users debating Phoebe Philo era vs Hedi Slimane era), 'Box Bag Relevance Discourse' (users asking if Box is still worth buying or is it dead), 'Celebrity Outfit Decoding Content' (users analyzing Wang Anyu and BTS V's Celine outfits), 'Soft 16 as Ultimate Commute Bag' (users reviewing Soft 16 for daily work use), 'Celine Sunglasses Authenticity Checks' (users posting legit checks and dupes), 'Cross-Border Celine Deal Hunting' (users sharing prices from Japan, Turkey, Spain), 'Old Money Quiet Luxury Styling' (users creating Celine-centered old money looks). BAD labels: 'CELINE 2026 Fashion Show' (that's an event), 'Brand Loyalty' (too generic), 'Handbag Collection' (too vague). Work only with the provided posts. Cluster by recurring XHS content patterns. For each trend: (1) label describing the XHS content trend, (2) one-sentence summary of what users are posting/discussing, (3) evidence with real post IDs and snippets, (4) metrics, (5) confidence. Include ai_reasoning. Never invent evidence.

trend_objects.label: Celine Blue Label Design Appreciation

This repeated emphasis indicates a strong user interest in scrutinizing and praising Celine's blue label design details, showing a clear content pattern around design appreciation.

trend_objects.label: CELINE 26 Summer Menswear Soft Relaxed Jacket Showcase
trend_objects.summary: XHS users are repeatedly posting content showcasing and discussing CELINE's 2026 summer menswear new relaxed and soft-styled jackets, focusing on their aesthetic and styling appeal.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: All post titles are identical, emphasizing CELINE's 2026 summer menswear new relaxed, stylish jackets, indicating a clear pattern of user content focusing on this specific product style and seasonal release.

snippets: CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克
CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克
CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克

posts.title: CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克
posts.creator: user_f55a698e
posts.image_caption: The post showcases a relaxed, stylish men's jacket from CELINE's summer collection, paired with high-waisted black denim jeans. The visual aesthetic is modern and sleek, featuring a stark contrast between the dark marble background and the outfit's neutral tones, primarily grey and black, complemented by a white top. The model carries a beige tote bag, with visible branding on it, and the overall look is completed with pointed black shoes, emphasizing a fashionable yet casual vibe.

posts.title: CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克
posts.creator: user_f55a698e
posts.image_caption: The image showcases a casual yet stylish men's jacket from CELINE's Summer 2026 collection, which has a relaxed fit and is paired with high-waisted wide-leg black jeans. The visual aesthetic features a contemporary and minimalist backdrop with striking black marble, emphasizing the chic vibe of the outfit. The color palette includes muted tones like gray for the jacket and black for the jeans, with a pop of plaid visible on the jacket cuffs, complemented by a beige tote featuring subtle branding and a gold necklace that adds a touch of elegance.

posts.title: CELINE 26夏季新款 松弛洋气的男装夹克
posts.creator: user_f55a698e

The color palette includes earthy tones like gray and classic black, with subtle plaid details visible on the jacket's sleeves. Branding is evident through the CELINE logo, and the model carries a beige tote bag adorned with a distinct pattern, enhancing the outfit's sophisticated vibe.

trend_objects.label: Celine Homme Seasonal Lookbook Sharing
trend_objects.summary: Users are repeatedly posting seasonal lookbook collections of Celine Homme menswear from various years, focusing on showcasing and discussing the styling and evolution of the brand's menswear line.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: All post titles explicitly mention Celine Homme followed by specific seasonal collections and years (2020AW, 2023AW, 2024AW), indicating users are primarily sharing curated looks or official runway collections of Celine's menswear. There are no divergent topics or debates, just repeated posting of seasonal lookbooks.

posts.title: celine homme 2024aw 第一辑
posts.creator: user_49c7743e
posts.image_caption: The image features a male model wearing a tailored dark gray double-breasted suit paired with fitted pants and stylish high-heeled boots. The visual aesthetic evokes a modern, minimalist vibe set against a striking desert landscape, with clear blue skies and mountains in the background. The color palette predominantly consists of dark tones, complemented by the sleek design and accessories, including round sunglasses and jewelry, contributing to a sophisticated yet contemporary look.

posts.title: celine 男装2020秋冬第一辑
posts.creator: user_49c7743e
posts.image_caption: The image showcases a male model wearing a tailored brown blazer with distinctive light-colored shoulder patches, paired with a light-colored shirt and blue denim jeans. The visual aesthetic leans towards a modern, yet retro vibe, featuring a dark runway with warm lighting that enhances the overall presentation. The color palette includes earthy tones and classic denim shades, while the styling is complemented by oversized sunglasses and a patterned scarf, accentuating a fashionable, contemporary look.

posts.title: celine homme 2023aw 第三辑
posts.creator: user_49c7743e
posts.image_caption: The image showcases a model wearing a striking black and white fur coat with a large, fluffy silhouette, paired with sleek black pants and shiny black shoes. The visual aesthetic is bold and high-fashion, characterized by a dramatic runway setting highlighted by soft lighting. The model is styled with oversized sunglasses and tousled hair, adding to a contemporary, edgy look that is indicative of the Celine Homme 2023 Autumn/Winter collection.

posts.title: celine homme 2023aw 第三辑
posts.creator: user_49c7743e
posts.image_caption: The image features a model walking the runway in a striking faux fur coat with a bold black and white tiger stripe pattern, paired with form-fitting black trousers and polished dress shoes. The visual aesthetic leans towards a modern, edgy style, enhanced by the model's sleek, straight hair and dark sunglasses. The overall color palette is monochromatic, emphasizing the dramatic contrast between the coat and the sleek black pants.
